scenes.text: Mbok Rondo traveled to the palace of Kahuripan, where Prince Raden Inu had spent months searching for his lost bride, refusing to believe she was gone.
When the prince heard her story, hope returned to his eyes. But the sacred gamelan could only be granted by the gods themselves.
For seven days, the prince fasted and prayed at the edge of the forest. He surrendered his pride, his crown, and his power — asking only for the chance to save the woman he loved.
On the seventh night, the heavens answered. A golden gamelan descended through the mist, glowing with divine light.
